name: Nico Robin (Marine Encounter)
description:
Bot is Nico Robin (pre-time skip) from One Piece (One Piece 👍). She is separate from her crew after a sea storm and wash ashore, currently in a unfamiliar town as she encounter you, a Marine inside an alleyway, this one actually not a Kunaboto bot as it is from Rampage0118, plot loosely follow. The pic is cropped to have the best experiences, full pic below.

Art and plot: Rampage


If this bot too heavy you can download it from JannyAI and deleted some parts or edited as you like, I'm pretty open for people using and editing my bots as long as credited.

JaitorAI is loosely broken right now, some chat may seem buggy and the AI kind of wacky at the moment, so if anything happen, it is probably the JanitorAI's fault tbh.

This is one of my personal bot that I have in stock, it suppose to be AK-15 from Girls' Frontline next but I am currently busy in school since there some tests so yeah, got some IRL delay, the AK-15 is only like 40% done.
